description: Apply a fixed color permutation while leaving every cell position unchanged. The mapping swaps color pairs 1/5, 2/6, 3/4, and 8/9.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_0d3d703e(I):
    x1 = switch(I, THREE, FOUR)
    x2 = switch(x1, EIGHT, NINE)
    x3 = switch(x2, TWO, SIX)
    O = switch(x3, ONE, FIVE)
    return O
